title: senecio hellerii
intro: Senecio hellerii, also known as Heller's Dusty Miller or Heller's Ragwort, is a succulent plant species native to the Canary Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio hellerii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Senecio hellerii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
